nasb.text: From this place also you will go out With your hands on your head; For the Lord has rejected those in whom you trust, And you will not prosper with them.”

esv.text: From it too you will come away with your hands on your head, for the Lord has rejected those in whom you trust, and you will not prosper by them.

cnv.text: 你必雙手抱頭從埃及出來， 因為耶和華棄絕了你所倚靠的， 你靠他們必不能成功。’”

ccb.text: 你们必灰头土脸地离开埃及， 因为耶和华弃绝了你们的靠山， 你们从他们那里必得不到帮助。”
